name: html-ppt-agent-skill
description: Deterministic CI, cross-browser smoke coverage, accessibility QA, visual production work orders, constrained browser editing, presenter mode, task regression, registered layouts, source ingestion, bundling, and automated delivery checks for the HTML PPT agent skill.

scripts.layouts:catalogs: node scripts/render-layout-catalog.mjs --theme swiss-grid --output qa/layout-catalogs/swiss-grid --force && node scripts/render-layout-catalog.mjs --theme editorial-ink --output qa/layout-catalogs/editorial-ink --force && node scripts/render-layout-catalog.mjs --theme technical-field --output qa/layout-catalogs/technical-field --force
scripts.layouts:qa: npm run layouts:catalogs && node scripts/qa-deck.mjs qa/layout-catalogs/swiss-grid/index.html --screenshots qa/layout-catalogs/swiss-grid/screenshots && node scripts/qa-deck.mjs qa/layout-catalogs/editorial-ink/index.html --screenshots qa/layout-catalogs/editorial-ink/screenshots && node scripts/qa-deck.mjs qa/layout-catalogs/technical-field/index.html --screenshots qa/layout-catalogs/technical-field/screenshots
scripts.test:core: node --test tests/structure.test.mjs tests/bundle.test.mjs tests/themes.test.mjs tests/layouts.test.mjs tests/visual-manifest.test.mjs tests/visual-work-orders.test.mjs tests/create-deck-visual-work-orders.test.mjs tests/source-ingestion.test.mjs tests/source-integration.test.mjs tests/task-regression.test.mjs
scripts.test:browser: node --test --test-concurrency=1 tests/runtime.test.mjs tests/editor.test.mjs tests/presenter.test.mjs tests/visual-qa.test.mjs tests/browser-smoke.test.mjs tests/theme-cjk-browser.test.mjs tests/accessibility.test.mjs
scripts.test: npm run test:core && npm run test:browser
scripts.ci:contracts: npm run layouts:validate && npm run tasks:validate && npm run test:core && npm run tasks:run && npm run example:validate && npm run example:manifest && npm run example:visual-plan && npm run example:visual && npm run example:bundle && node scripts/validate-deck.mjs examples/ai-ad-workflow/dist/ai-ad-workflow.html
scripts.ci:browser: npm run test:browser && npm run example:accessibility
scripts.ci: npm run ci:contracts && npm run ci:browser
scripts.themes:validate: node scripts/validate-deck.mjs assets/themes/swiss-grid/preview.html && node scripts/validate-deck.mjs assets/themes/editorial-ink/preview.html && node scripts/validate-deck.mjs assets/themes/technical-field/preview.html && node scripts/validate-deck.mjs assets/themes/guizang-magazine/preview.html && node scripts/validate-deck.mjs assets/themes/guizang-swiss/preview.html && node scripts/validate-deck.mjs assets/themes/cobalt-executive-deck/preview.html && node scripts/validate-deck.mjs assets/themes/coral-startup-deck/preview.html && node scripts/validate-deck.mjs assets/themes/ribbon-tab-brochure/preview.html && node scripts/validate-deck.mjs assets/themes/blue-growth-deck/preview.html
scripts.themes:qa: node scripts/qa-deck.mjs assets/themes/swiss-grid/preview.html --screenshots qa/themes/swiss-grid && node scripts/qa-deck.mjs assets/themes/editorial-ink/preview.html --screenshots qa/themes/editorial-ink && node scripts/qa-deck.mjs assets/themes/technical-field/preview.html --screenshots qa/themes/technical-field && node scripts/qa-deck.mjs assets/themes/guizang-magazine/preview.html --screenshots qa/themes/guizang-magazine && node scripts/qa-deck.mjs assets/themes/guizang-swiss/preview.html --screenshots qa/themes/guizang-swiss && node scripts/qa-deck.mjs assets/themes/cobalt-executive-deck/preview.html --screenshots qa/themes/cobalt-executive-deck && node scripts/qa-deck.mjs assets/themes/coral-startup-deck/preview.html --screenshots qa/themes/coral-startup-deck && node scripts/qa-deck.mjs assets/themes/ribbon-tab-brochure/preview.html --screenshots qa/themes/ribbon-tab-brochure && node scripts/qa-deck.mjs assets/themes/blue-growth-deck/preview.html --screenshots qa/themes/blue-growth-deck
scripts.example:visual-plan: node scripts/build-visual-work-orders.mjs examples/ai-ad-workflow/deck.json --output examples/ai-ad-workflow/qa/visual-work-orders.json --markdown examples/ai-ad-workflow/qa/visual-work-orders.md --stage delivery --force && node scripts/validate-visual-work-orders.mjs examples/ai-ad-workflow/qa/visual-work-orders.json --deck examples/ai-ad-workflow/deck.json --stage delivery --strict
